claims.statement: HaloBank's Mercury perihelion diagnostic is only admissible at diagnostic tier when a pinned weak-field solar GR metric context reproduces perihelion advance from Mercury-minus-Sun relative states within configured deterministic tolerance bands and fails deterministically when the event window is undersampled.

evaluation window must stay inside the configured 1900-2100 epoch span
insufficient perihelion-event counts must fail deterministically
